title: Ankle Pumps
instructions: Sit comfortably with your leg elevated on a pillow
Slowly flex your ankle, pulling your toes toward you
Hold for 2-3 seconds
Point your toes away from you
Hold for 2-3 seconds
Repeat in a smooth, controlled motion
precautions: Stop if you feel sharp pain

title: Toe Curls
instructions: Sit with your foot flat on the floor
Place a small towel on the floor in front of you
Use your toes to curl and grab the towel
Hold for 5 seconds
Release and repeat

title: Heel Slides
instructions: Lie on your back with both legs straight
Slowly slide your height toward your buttocks
Slide as far as comfortable (45-90 degrees)
Hold for 5 seconds
Slowly slide back to starting position

title: Quad Sets
instructions: Lie on your back with one leg straight
Tighten the muscle on top of your thigh
Push the back of your knee down into the floor
Hold for 5 seconds
Relax and repeat

title: Straight Leg Raise
instructions: Lie on your back with one leg straight and one bent
Tighten your thigh muscle on the straight leg
Lift your leg about 12 inches off the floor
Keep your knee completely straight
Lower slowly with control

title: Ankle Circles
instructions: Sit comfortably or lie back with your leg elevated
Rotate your ankle slowly in a circular motion
Do 10 circles clockwise
Do 10 circles counter-clockwise

title: Gentle Ankle Circles
instructions: Sit in a chair with your foot off the ground
Slowly rotate your ankle clockwise
Make small, gentle circles
Reverse direction and do the same
Keep movements smooth and controlled
If standing, hold onto something for balance

title: Calf Stretches
instructions: Stand facing a wall with hands at shoulder height
Step the affected leg back about 2 feet
Keep your back heel on the floor
Bend your front knee slightly
Feel the stretch in your back calf
Hold for 30 seconds, then switch legs

title: Seated Marching
instructions: Sit in a sturdy chair with feet flat on floor
Lift your right knee as high as comfortable
Lower it back down with control
Lift your left knee
Continue alternating in a marching motion
Swing arms naturally if desired
precautions: Don't lift knees too high if painful

title: Balance Weight Shifts
instructions: Stand behind a sturdy chair, holding it for support
Shift your weight onto your right foot
Hold for 10-20 seconds
Return to center
Shift weight to your left foot
Hold for 10-20 seconds

title: Heel-to-Toe Walking
instructions: Stand near a wall or have someone walk beside you
Place your heel directly in front of your toes
Take slow, deliberate steps in a line
Keep your eyes focused ahead
Take 20 steps, rest, repeat
Use wall or person for support if needed
precautions: Start in a safe, open area

title: Ankle Alphabet
instructions: Sit comfortably with your leg extended
Use your big toe to trace the alphabet in the air
Make the letters as large as comfortable
Move only your ankle, not your leg
Complete A through Z
This exercises all ankle movements
precautions: Stop if any movement causes pain

title: Towel Stretch
instructions: Sit on the floor with your legs extended
Loop a towel around the ball of your foot
Hold the ends of the towel with both hands
Gently pull the towel toward you
Keep your knee straight
Feel the stretch in your calf and foot

title: Foot Roll Massage
instructions: Sit in a chair with a tennis ball or frozen water bottle
Place the ball under your foot
Roll your foot back and forth over the ball
Apply gentle pressure
Roll from heel to toe and side to side
Focus on tender areas

title: Resisted Ankle Inversion
instructions: Sit in a chair or lie on your side
Loop a resistance band around your foot
Hold the other end of the band
Turn your foot inward against resistance
Hold for 2 seconds
Slowly return to start
